meaning: v.打扫,以(腐肉)为食,从废物中提取
examples: Some fish scavenge on dead fish in the wild.
No squirrels are known to hunt vertebrates, or even scavenge meat.
Serial uses a single GC thread, whilst ParNew and Parallel Scavenge both use multiple threads.
While the hawk's aloft, the seagulls that come to scavenge are kept under proper control.
Children as young as 7 scavenge hours at a time for recyclable materials.
